sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons and Regulations CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Chimney Reservoir: Open year around. Daily: 15 game fish of which not more than 5 may be black bass, 5 may be walleye, 2 may be white bass hybrid (wiper), and zero may be tiger muskie (catch and release only). The minimum length for white bass hybrids is 15 inches total length. Possession: 30 game fish of which not more than 10 may be black bass, 10 may be walleye, 4 may be white bass hybrid (wiper). Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Chimney Reservoir — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: White crappie, walleye, largemouth bass, channel catfish, bluegill, wipers (white bass x striped bass hybrid), and tiger musky.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.humanSummary: Chimney Reservoir is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: Of the 15 daily game fish, not more than 5 may be black bass, 5 may be walleye, and 2 may be white bass hybrid (wiper). Of the 30 in possession, not more than 10 may be black bass, 10 may be walleye, and 4 may be white bass hybrid (wiper).

regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit of 15 game fish (up to 5 black bass, 5 walleye, 2 wiper); possession limit 30 game fish (up to 10 black bass, 10 walleye, 4 wiper).
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 15 game fish of which not more than 5 may be black bass, 5 may be walleye, 2 may be white bass hybrid (wiper), and zero may be tiger muskie (catch and release only). Possession: 30 game fish of which not more than 10 may be black bass, 10 may be walleye, 4 may be white bass hybrid (wiper).

regulations.humanSummary: Tiger muskie may not be kept at Chimney Reservoir; catch and release only.
regulations.verbatimText: zero may be tiger muskie (catch and release only)

parameters.note: Applies to white bass hybrid (wiper) only.

regulations.humanSummary: White bass hybrid (wiper) must be at least 15 inches total length to keep.
regulations.verbatimText: The minimum length for white bass hybrids is 15 inches total length.

regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is allowed any hour of the day or night.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
